---
title: "Introduction to Quarto"
format: html
biobliograpy: references.bib
---

# Introduction

## About the data

-   Water sample data from Arctic Ocean
-   Data downloaded from the Arctic Data Center: [Tweedie ADC data](https://arcticdata.io/catalog/view/doi:10.18739/A25T3FZ8X)

## Setup

```{r}
#| warning: false
library(readr)
library(here)
```

## Read in data

```{r}
#| warning: false
bg_chem <- read_csv(here("data/NPEOchem2008data.csv"))
```

# Analysis

## Calculate summary statistics

```{r}
#| echo: false

# Print the column anmes
colnames(bg_chem)

# Show the data structure
str(bg_chem)

# Show the first 6 lines of the data frame
head(bg_chem)

#  Get summary of each column
summary(bg_chem)

# Print unique values in the 
unique(bg_chem$Date)
```

## Calculate mean Redfield ratio

```{r}
# calculate some means
nitrate <- mean(bg_chem$NO3)
```

## Plot Redfield ratio

# Conclusion
